summary: Frontend testing of Rough Estimates (RE) tab in Planning Board. Most UI features working correctly but critical API integration bugs found - Start/Submit/Approve buttons call non-existent backend endpoints.

critical.issue: Start button calls /api/crm/re-projects/{id}/status endpoint which does NOT exist on backend. Returns 404.
Submit button also uses the non-existent /status endpoint
Approval handler calls /api/crm/re-projects/{id}/approval but backend has /approve

integration_issues.issue: All status change buttons (Start, Submit, Review) fail due to wrong API endpoints

action_items: FIX handleReStatusChange in PlanningBoard.jsx line 305-310: For 'Start' (re_requested -> re_in_progress), use PATCH /api/crm/re-projects/{id} with any field update (backend auto-changes status). For 'Submit' (re_in_progress -> re_submitted), use POST /api/crm/re-projects/{id}/submit-for-approval
FIX handleReApproval in PlanningBoard.jsx line 313-321: Change /approval to /approve in the endpoint URL
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend RE status change endpoints don't match backend routes - /status endpoint does not exist
Frontend approval endpoint uses /approval but backend has /approve
Console shows 404 errors on page load due to these API mismatches

success_rate.frontend: 70% - UI displays correctly but API integrations broken

context_for_next_testing_agent: RE tab in Planning Board has correct UI but broken API calls. Key data-testids working: tab-rough-estimates, re-status-new, re-status-in_progress, re-edit-{id}, re-project-{id}. 1 RE project exists with status re_requested. After fixing API endpoints, test Start->Submit->Review workflow.

re_projects_removed_from_nav.details: Planning user nav does NOT show 'RE Projects' link - only has Planning Board, Projects, BOQ

rough_estimates_tab_visible.details: Tab exists with red badge showing count (1)

status_cards_visible.details: All 5 status cards visible - New Requests (1), In Progress (0), Awaiting Approval (0), Approved (0), Rejected (0)

re_project_card_fields.details: Card shows Client name, Location, Size, Estimated Total, phone, email, Edit button, Start button

edit_dialog_functionality.details: Edit button opens dialog with all form fields (Project Name, Client Name, Phone, Email, Location, Area, Rate, Notes)

start_button_functionality.details: Clicking Start does not change status - API returns 404 for /status endpoint

submit_button_functionality.details: Could not test - depends on Start button working first

review_button_functionality.details: Could not test - depends on Submit button working first

verified_features: Planning user header nav does NOT contain 'RE Projects' link
Planning Board has 'Rough Estimates' tab with red badge count
RE status cards (New, In Progress, Awaiting, Approved, Rejected) display correctly
RE project card shows Client, Location, Size, Estimated Total
RE project card shows phone/email contact info
RE Edit button opens dialog with correct form fields
RE Edit dialog has Cancel and Save buttons

bugs_found.reproduction_steps: 1. Login as planning user, 2. Go to Planning Board, 3. Click Rough Estimates tab, 4. Click Start button on RE project, 5. See 404 error in console

backend_available_endpoints.update_re_project: PATCH /api/crm/re-projects/{id} (auto-changes status to re_in_progress if status was re_requested/re_rejected)
